---
title: "analysis_6dpf_r21"
output: html_document
date: "2024-09-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Load required libraries
library(DESeq2)
library(tximport)
library(ggplot2)
library(vsn)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(tidyverse)
library(KEGGREST)
library(enrichplot)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Dr.eg.db)
library(DOSE)
```

```{r}
setwd("/Volumes/CSDG/Daniel_Gray/BulkRNASeq/RNA_seq_6dpf_brains/salmon_output_last_version")
# Get a list of all directories (assuming each directory is a sample)
samplea <- list.dirs(path = ".", full.names = FALSE, recursive = FALSE)

samples<- samplea [c (5:8, 21:23)]

# Create a data frame with sample information
sampleTableder <- data.frame(
  sample = samples,
  condition = factor(sub(".*_(\\w+)_\\d+$", "\\1", samples))  # Adjust this based on your sample names
)



# Create a list of paths to the Salmon quant.sf files
files <- file.path(samples, "quant.sf")
names(files) <- samples

# Import Salmon quantification data
tx2gene <- read.table("/Volumes/CSDG/Daniel_Gray/BulkRNASeq/RNA_seq_6dpf_brains/Genome annotation files/gene_id_to_name.tsv", sep="\t", header=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE)  # You need to provide this file
txi <- tximport(files, type = "salmon", tx2gene = tx2gene)

sampleTable<-read.csv("/Volumes/CSDG/Daniel_Gray/BulkRNASeq/RNA_seq_6dpf_brains/Genome annotation files/sample_sheet_r21wik.csv",header=TRUE)

```

```{r}
# Create DESeqDataSet object
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(txi, sampleTable, ~condition)
dds <-DESeq(dds)
# Perform variance stabilizing transformation
vsd <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)

# Perform PCA
pca_data <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "condition", returnData = TRUE)

# Create PCA plot
pca_plot <- ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = condition)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = name), vjust = 2, hjust = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#7030A0", "#9999FF", "dark grey", "black" , "navy")) +
  ggtitle("PCA of RNA-seq Samples")

# Save the plot
ggsave("pca_plot_dan_r21.png", pca_plot, width = 10, height = 8)

# Print the plot to the screen
print(pca_plot)
rm(pca_plot)
```

```{r}
head(assay(vsd))
meanSdPlot(assay(vsd))

sampleDists <- dist(t(assay(vsd)))

sampleDistMatrix <- as.matrix(sampleDists)
rownames(sampleDistMatrix) <- paste(vsd$condition, vsd$type, sep="-")
colnames(sampleDistMatrix) <- NULL
colors <- colorRampPalette( rev(brewer.pal(9, "Purples")) )(255)
heatmap<- pheatmap(sampleDistMatrix,
         clustering_distance_rows=sampleDists,
         clustering_distance_cols=sampleDists,
         col=colors)
ggsave("clustered_heatmap_dan.png", heatmap, width = 10, height = 8)
rm(heatmap)
```

```{r}
write.csv(counts(dds), "counts_daniel.csv")

## generating DEG lists for R21 and S2b
# R21 
res_r21 <- results(dds, contrast = c('condition', 'R21', 'Wik_D'))
resSig_r21 <- subset(res_r21, padj < 0.1)

head(resSig_r21[ order( resSig_r21$log2FoldChange ), ])
head(resSig_r21[ order( -resSig_r21$log2FoldChange ), ])
topGene <- rownames(resSig_r21)[which.min(resSig_r21$padj)]


## annotating with gene names and saving .csv of DEG
gene_annotations <- read.csv("/Volumes/CSDG/Daniel_Gray/BulkRNASeq/RNA_seq_6dpf_brains/Genome annotation files/GTF_gene_id_to_name.csv", 
                             header = TRUE, 
                             stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
# R21
geneIDs <- rownames(resSig_r21)
gene_name_lookup <- setNames(gene_annotations$gene_name, gene_annotations$gene_id)
resSig_r21
resSig_r21$LLgeneSymbol <- gene_name_lookup[rownames(resSig_r21)]
write.csv(resSig_r21, "sigs_R21_WTS.csv")

```

``` {r}
#### r21 analysis
### gene ontology analysis from michael: GO_KEGG_clusterP.R

# make list order by l2fc
original_gene_list <- resSig_r21$log2FoldChange
names(original_gene_list) <- resSig_r21$LLgeneSymbol
original_gene_list
gene_list<-na.omit(original_gene_list)
gene_list = sort(gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)

gse <- gseGO(geneList=gene_list, 
             ont ="ALL", 
             keyType = "SYMBOL", 
             nPerm = 10000, 
             minGSSize = 3, 
             maxGSSize = 800, 
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05, 
             verbose = TRUE, 
             OrgDb = org.Dr.eg.db , 
             pAdjustMethod = "none")


pdf("R21WIKGSEAplots.pdf")

dotplot(gse, showCategory=10, split=".sign", font.size = 6) + facet_grid(.~.sign)

emapplot(pairwise_termsim(gse), cex.params = list(category_label = 0.5, line = 0.5, label_words_n =3, max.overlaps = 0))

cnetplot(gse, categorySize="pvalue", foldChange=gene_list, showCategory = 7, cex.params = list(category_label = 0.6, gene_label = 0.5, line = 0.5, label_words_n =3, max.overlaps = 0))

ridgeplot(gse, showCategory = 20, fill = "p.adjust",
  core_enrichment = F,
  label_format = 50) + labs(x = "enrichment distribution")


gseaplot(gse, by = "all", title = gse$Description[7], geneSetID = 7, font.size = 6)

### KEGG analysis
# Convert gene IDs for gseKEGG function
# We will lose some genes here because not all IDs will be converted
ids<-bitr(names(original_gene_list), fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb=org.Dr.eg.db)
# remove duplicate IDS (here I use "ENSEMBL", but it should be whatever was selected as keyType)
dedup_ids = ids[!duplicated(ids[c("SYMBOL")]),]

# Create a new dataframe df2 which has only the genes which were successfully mapped using the bitr function above
sum(duplicated(resSig_r21$LLgeneSymbol))
resSig_r212 <- resSig_r21[!duplicated(resSig_r21[c("LLgeneSymbol")]),]
df2 = resSig_r212[resSig_r212$LLgeneSymbol %in% dedup_ids$SYMBOL,]
sum(duplicated(df2$LLgeneSymbol))
# Create a new column in df2 with the corresponding ENTREZ IDs
df2$Y = dedup_ids$ENTREZID
# Create a vector of the gene universe
kegg_gene_list <- df2$log2FoldChange
# Name vector with ENTREZ ids
names(kegg_gene_list) <- df2$Y
# omit any NA values 
kegg_gene_list<-na.omit(kegg_gene_list)
# sort the list in decreasing order (required for clusterProfiler)
kegg_gene_list = sort(kegg_gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)
head(kegg_gene_list)

# pdf("R21WIKKEGGplots.pdf")
kegg_organism = "dre"
kk2 <- gseKEGG(geneList     = kegg_gene_list,
               organism     = kegg_organism,
               nPerm        = 10000,
               minGSSize    = 1,
               maxGSSize    = 500,
               pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
               pAdjustMethod = "none",
               keyType       = "ncbi-geneid")


dotplot(kk2, showCategory = 10, title = "Enriched Pathways" , split=".sign") + facet_grid(.~.sign)
emapplot(pairwise_termsim(kk2))

cnetplot(kk2, categorySize="pvalue", foldChange=kegg_gene_list, showCategory = 6, cex.params = list(category_label = 0.6, gene_label = 0.5, line = 0.5, label_words_n =3, max.overlaps = 0))

```
